Locus Access

Email and password access for the worker portal and insurer console.

HomeWorker PortalSettingsInsurer Console

What you can do here

Worker portal

Check coverage, incident status, payout history, and prediction outputs.

Insurer console

Review claims, run simulations, and keep the admin flow restricted to admin users.

Email/password only

No OTP or phone-based login is used in this build.

Sign in

Need an account?
